Module 5:
Brilliant Recalls PLC 2
!
Executive Summary
PLC #2 of Susan Garrett’s Brilliant Recalls course
PLC #2 begins by referencing back to the first video (PLC #1). The video
should be able to stand alone, but it’s important to refer back to the initial
and next video because it helps create that Story Arc.
• 	0:40 - Foreshadows videos
• 	0:50 - Delivers hook for this video, with curiosity, overcoming objections
• 	1:40 - More objection crushing
• 	2:15 - Myth busting and teaching - here she goes into a great segment of
teaching
• 	5:40 - Story and teaching
• 	12:50 - Starts to get very specific with her teaching and training
• 	15:10 - Foreshadowing next video
• 	15:35 - Begins to bring it back to the community (thanks for the
comments), social proof, and big why
!

• 	16:00 - More foreshadowing of next video - asks a question and leaves
viewer with a hook
The way Susan ends this video is fantastic. It leaves the viewer anticipating
the next video, which is an important piece of the prelaunch process.
!
